## AbstractModelClass.deleteMany() method

Deletes multiple documents from the database that match the specified filter.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static deleteMany(filter?: QueryRootFilter, options?: QueryDeleteManyOptions): Query<any, any>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

filter


</td><td>

QueryRootFilter


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ An optional filter object to specify the search criteria for the documents to be deleted. If no filter is provided, all documents in the store will be deleted.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

options


</td><td>

QueryDeleteManyOptions


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Optional settings for the deleteMany operation.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Query&lt;any, any&gt;

A promise that resolves with the result of the delete operation, including information about the number of documents deleted.

## Example


```ts
const result = await UserModel.deleteMany({ age: { $lt: 18 } });
console.log(result);
```
